segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Hey, did you see that documentary on urban development last night? The one we were assigned to watch? It was way more interesting than I expected. Yes, the part about how cities are redesigning public spaces was fascinating. I thought I'd have a hard time getting through it. It makes me look forward to our field trip to the city even more. I mean, I've been a million times. but I know what you mean after this and the things our professor will probably point out. Ita, totally new experience.
